en: Is your company registered with the Registrar-General’s Department (RGD)?
If Yes, please provide a copy of your Form 3.
Is your company registered with Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA)?
If Yes, Please provide your Company’s TIN

"Indigenous Ghanaian company" means a company incorporated under the Companies Act, 1963 (Act 179)
that has at least fifty-one percent of its equity owned by a citizen of Ghana; and
that has Ghanaian citizens holding at least eighty percent of executive and senior management positions and one hundred percent of non-managerial and other positions
